name: @amirhossein-shk/tournament-bracket-js
description: Lightweight vanilla JS tournament bracket library

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run browser && npm run browser:min && npm run esm && npm run esm:min && npm run css && npm run css:min && npm run clean:temp
scripts.browser:min: vite build --mode browser-min --outDir dist-temp && shx cp dist-temp/tournament-bracket.js dist/tournament-bracket.min.js
scripts.esm:min: vite build --mode esm-min --outDir dist-temp && shx cp dist-temp/tournament-bracket.esm.js dist/tournament-bracket.esm.min.js

author: Amirhossein Shk <amirhossein.shk@gmail.com>
